rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes; use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings
Generate AGREE contracts inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks with valid AGREE syntax
generic_rules: Use assume/guarantee syntax with valid logical operators and expression types
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type-level contracts
Encode range bounds using named constants and visible feature names
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts
Declare helpers with `eq name : type = expression;` and constants with `const name : type = value;`
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
